summary: Dashboard shows proper authenticated UI structure with correct layout, navigation, and content sections. Brand palette violates diner aesthetic requirements with neutral grays instead of specified cream/teal colors. All required dashboard widgets are present and properly positioned.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray UI surfaces instead of required diner palette - should use cream (#fff8ea) for cards and appropriate diner colors rather than generic gray backgrounds
Signed-in dashboard chrome uses generic neutral styling that visually bleeds into non-diner territory, violating the separation between public marketing palette and authenticated app chrome

actions: Apply diner cream palette (#fff8ea) to dashboard card surfaces
Update dashboard background and container colors to use diner-appropriate surfaces
Ensure authenticated UI maintains visual coherence with public brand palette per brand consistency requirements
